overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a walk along a futuristic waterfront promenade. The player moves through palm-lined plazas, observes a marina with docked boats, passes through a covered corridor with large digital billboards, and crosses a street with parked vehicles. Bright sunlight and vivid neon advertisements create a high-contrast cyberpunk aesthetic.

scene_state.functional_zone: open waterfront plaza with palm trees and digital signage

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the plaza toward the waterfront

entered.detail: tall palm trees lining the waterfront plaza
tall modern street lamp with orange accent light
large digital billboard displaying advertisement with a person in colorful outfit
metal railing along the waterfront edge overlooking the ocean
calm blue ocean water visible beyond the promenade

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a wide, sunlit waterfront plaza with palm trees and modern street furniture. The camera moves forward toward the water, passing scattered pedestrians. A large digital billboard stands prominently on the right side of the frame.

events.description: slows down to look over the railing at the boats docked in the marina

agents.ego_description: pausing to observe the motor boats docked in the marina below

entered.detail: wooden dock structure extending into the water with multiple slips
several small motor boats moored at the marina dock
metal safety railing along the marina overlook

segments.scene_description: The camera approaches the marina railing and slows to look down at the docked boats in the water. The marina features several small motor boats and a wooden dock structure. The palm trees shift to the left side of the frame as the perspective changes.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered waterfront walkway with digital advertising wall

events.description: enters shaded corridor with large purple digital billboards on the left wall

agents.ego_description: walking along the waterfront path passing the large billboard and entering the covered area

notable_agents.action: person in colorful outfit with pink leg warmers walking toward the camera

entered.detail: long wall covered with large glowing purple and pink digital advertisements
concrete ramp structure with orange safety stripes leading upward

segments.scene_description: The camera continues along the waterfront, passing a pedestrian in colorful attire, and enters a covered corridor. The lighting shifts dramatically as the scene moves into shade, with a massive digital advertising wall displaying vibrant purple neon graphics on the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian corridor with neon advertisements

agents.ego_description: walking through the covered corridor with digital ads on the left wall

notable_agents.action: pedestrian walking in the opposite direction through the corridor

segments.scene_description: The camera moves deeper into the covered corridor, passing another pedestrian. The concrete ramp with orange stripes becomes more prominent ahead, while the digital advertising wall extends along the left side, gradually receding into the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: open waterfront promenade with concrete retaining walls

events.description: exits the covered corridor back into direct sunlight

agents.ego_description: walking along the open waterfront promenade past the concrete ramp structure

entered.detail: tall concrete retaining wall with horizontal orange stripes
futuristic city skyline visible across the water in the distance

segments.scene_description: The camera exits the covered corridor into bright sunlight, revealing a concrete retaining wall with orange stripes on the left. The path continues along the open waterfront with a distant futuristic city skyline visible across the water.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban waterfront street with parked vehicles

events.description: approaches and crosses the street with parked cars and pedestrians

agents.ego_description: crossing the street toward the parked vehicles and commercial building

notable_agents.action: yellow taxi cab parked at the curb with people standing nearby

entered.detail: large dark green commercial building with reflective glass facade
row of various parked cars along the street
distinctive yellow taxi cab parked near the sidewalk
yellow and black parking meter on the sidewalk

segments.scene_description: The camera approaches a street crossing with a large dark green commercial building on the left. Several cars are parked along the curb, including a prominent yellow taxi. Pedestrians are scattered throughout the area as the camera crosses toward the building.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a sunlit waterfront plaza through a shaded neon corridor and back into the bright city light. It begins by moving through a wide, palm-lined plaza past pedestrians and a large digital billboard before slowing at a marina railing to overlook docked motor boats. As the camera continues along the water, the scene shifts dramatically from bright daylight into the shade of a covered corridor dominated by a massive, vibrant purple neon advertising wall. The perspective then follows a concrete ramp with orange stripes until it exits the corridor, returning to the sunlight to reveal a distant futuristic skyline across the water. Finally, the camera approaches a street crossing, passing a yellow taxi and parked cars before moving toward a large dark green commercial building.
